creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2012-12-05 08:25, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> * Rusty Nejdl (rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com) wrote:
> 
>>> Maintainer of games/wesnoth,
>>> 
>>> Please note that PR ports/174139 has just been submitted.
>>> 
>>> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>>> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>>> and a committer will take care of it.
>>> 
>>> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>>>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/174139
>> 
>> Please find attached a diff that includes this fix as well as 
>> updating
>> to 1.10.5 (stable).
> 
> Looks good, currently testing in a tinderbox. Should I commit it
> afterwards?

Yes please.  If I find some time, I might submit a devel package too.

Rusty
